noSlugDesc: Set the clinic slug in Settings → Profile to enable booking links.
title: Booking Links
subtitle: Copy and share with your patients
bookingDesc: Patients can book a session with {clinic} automatically.
docsDesc: Link for the patient to send lab tests, forms and intake before the appointment.
zoomDesc: Your personal Zoom room link to send to patients.
proZoomDesc: Direct link to this practitioner's Zoom room.
portalDesc: To send a private portal link to a specific patient, open the patient's profile → Portal link. Unique, no login, expires in 7 days.
tipDesc: Copy the booking link and send it via WhatsApp, email or put it in your Instagram bio. Your patients book without having to call.
